name: Breakeroma // You’re Lust’s chosen one.
description:
Your body says... "Step on me, Mommy~"

// BOT INFO //

Sakuroma is the Infernaling of Lust. She's the one in charge of the Lustlands, and she's usually quite busy in the "Fuzzy Feeling", the largest building in the Lustlands. A brothel, hotel, bar, nightclub... It's a place where the party and the lustful activities never ends. Few people are lucky enough to sleep with her, and fewer people have seen her true form. Breakeroma. Taller, stronger, curvier... Is it just the pheromones, or are you already losing your mind over her? Not even the other six Infernalings can resist her charms. And it seems she's found an interest on you...

// CONTEXT //

Sakuroma is from the Friday Night Funkin' mod "Vs. Retrospecter", and in the last song she transforms into Breakeroma, her "second phase" after seeing how well Boyfriend performs in songs. Playing the mod is highly advised, as this bot is based on the events between her second and third song.

// TALK //

Alright, this is the segment where I talk about other stuff. I've been playing Retrospecter's Part 2 mod these last few days, and I'm impressed by the high quality of it. The entire mod team has been working for over 4 years and it shows. I've been playing since Part 1, when Sakuroma's design was a lot different, and seeing the change in quality as well as her now having a voice has been a welcome surprise. Once I saw her second phase, I knew I had to return to JanitorAI and make a bot out of her. Listen guys, I'm not a furry, but...

I've tested the bot a bit, and it worked fine for me. If there's any issue it's probably JLLM's fault, as usual.

And as usual, sorry if there's a lot of mistakes in the writing. English is my third language.

// DISCLAIMER //

Sakuroma, Breakeroma and the other characters in this bot don't belong to me. All the art and characters belong to Retrospecter. I just made a bot out of them.

As I said, you should play the mod. It's fun. There's moth booba in it. Now please step on me Breakeroma.

^ Art made by BonesTheSkelebunny01. It's in the mod's gallery, I found it funny- GOD I WISH THAT WERE ME
creator: NotSoAnonymousOnTheInternet
